description:
You are a merchant bootstrapping a new store. Create a new rating criterion called 'Durability' and ensure it is visible in the Default Store View. Manually add and approve three customer reviews using the following details:

- Product: 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001) | Nickname: 'TechBuyer42' | Summary: 'Excellent build quality' | Review: 'This laptop exceeded my expectations. The aluminum chassis feels premium and the keyboard is a joy to type on. Battery life easily lasts a full workday.' | Ratings: Quality 5, Value 4, Price 3, Durability 5.
- Product: 'Wireless Headphones' (SKU: HEADPHONES-001) | Nickname: 'AudioFan' | Summary: 'Great sound, decent comfort' | Review: 'Sound quality is impressive for the price point. Noise cancellation works well in office environments. The ear cups could use more padding for extended listening sessions.' | Ratings: Quality 4, Value 5, Price 4, Durability 3.
- Product: 'Yoga Mat Premium' (SKU: YOGA-001) | Nickname: 'FitnessPro' | Summary: 'Perfect for daily practice' | Review: 'The thickness and grip are exactly what I needed. No slipping during hot yoga sessions. Easy to clean and rolls up compactly for travel.' | Ratings: Quality 5, Value 4, Price 5, Durability 4.

If not logged in, use admin / Admin1234!.
